title: Reduction AxisDimension should be specified when using reduction operations
description: This rule checks if the axis dimension is defined when using reduction operations like sum, min, max, etc.
message: AxisDimension should be specified when using reduction operations.
recommendation: Specify the axis dimension when using reduction operations.

noncompliant.code:
import numpy as np
result = np.sum(arr)
noncompliant.description: This example does not specify the axis dimension.

compliant.code:
import numpy as np
result = np.sum(arr, axis=0)
compliant.description: This example specifies the axis dimension.

why_is_this_an_issue: Not specifying the axis dimension can lead to unexpected results and performance degradation.
how_to_fix: Always specify the axis dimension when using reduction operations.

logic.new_check_type_doc: Checks if the given function name is a reduction operation and if it does not have an axis dimension specified.

metadata.title: Reduction AxisDimension should be specified when using reduction operations
